name: Grey Ghost
description:
The Grey Ghost is a known male dragon considered wild and yet to be tamed, roaming on the island of Dragonstone by the seven kingdoms of Westeros. Like the Cannibal dragon, The Grey Ghost is a male dragon shrouded in mystery without a rider that hasn't let anyone get close.

A male dragon of humongus size, terribly fierce strength and speed, The Grey Ghost is a dragon with silver-grey scales all over it's body with silver spikes all over it's scaly body and silver horns around it's dragon face. The Grey Ghost also has eerie blood red eyes and dragon fire a mix of black, grey, silver, and blood red.

Like the Cannibal dragon, the Grey Ghost dragon has eluded anyone trying to make anyone it's rider, allowing anyone to get close enough to try, let alone live to tell the tale of having survived such a dragon.

Like any other dragon that long ago knowledge spoken through ancient texts, the Grey Ghost is as the name it's been coined: swift, shadowy, secretive, elusive, mysterious, and deathy like a ghost itself. And also known to circle around area's especially after death, blood, and chaos.

The Grey Ghost was a pale grey-white dragon, residing primarily in a smoking vent high on the eastern side of the Dragonmont. , located close by the Red Keep, the ruling seat of the Iron Throne over which who sits the throne, rules over the seven kingdoms of Westeros. The Red Keep, located in King's Landing, is apart of the Crownlands, one of the seven kingdoms of Westeros.

The Grey Ghost is known also to have earned his name for his solitary nature, shyly avoiding men and their works, remaining unseen for years at a time. He could sometimes be glimpsed hunting for fish in the Narrow Sea.

Similarly to the Cannibal, The Grey Ghost never accepted a rider.
creator: allisonlynn
